scripts.dev: bun scripts/with-platform.ts local bun --bun node_modules/vite-plus/bin/vp dev
scripts.build: bun scripts/with-platform.ts local bun --bun node_modules/vite-plus/bin/vp build
scripts.preview: bun scripts/with-platform.ts local bun --bun node_modules/vite-plus/bin/vp preview
scripts.check: vp run schema:check && bun scripts/with-platform.ts local svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.cf:check: vp run schema:check && bun scripts/with-platform.ts cloudflare svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.cron:sweep: CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron sweep
scripts.cron:parse-one: CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron parse-one
scripts.cron:catalog: CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron catalog
scripts.cron:mimic: CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron mimic
scripts.cron:seed-std: STATIC_R2_TARGET=local WRANGLER_PERSIST_TO=.wrangler/state CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron seed-std
scripts.cron:seed-std:if-missing: STATIC_R2_TARGET=local WRANGLER_PERSIST_TO=.wrangler/state CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron seed-std --if-missing
scripts.static:std: STATIC_R2_TARGET=remote CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron seed-std
scripts.static:local: STATIC_R2_TARGET=local WRANGLER_PERSIST_TO=.wrangler/state CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 NAME=${NAME:-serde} VERSION=${VERSION:-1.0.228} cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron parse-one
scripts.static:batch: STATIC_R2_TARGET=local WRANGLER_PERSIST_TO=.wrangler/state CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron seed-std --if-missing && STATIC_R2_TARGET=local WRANGLER_PERSIST_TO=.wrangler/state CODEVIEW_SKIP_SIDECAR=1 cargo run --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml -p codeview-cli -- cron publish-run --corpus top:${TOP_CRATE_COUNT:-30} --max-total ${TOP_CRATE_COUNT:-30}
scripts.cf:types: vp run cf:types:app && vp run cf:types:parser
scripts.cf:build: bun scripts/retain-cloudflare-assets.ts capture && bun scripts/with-platform.ts cloudflare vp build && bun scripts/harden-cloudflare-worker.ts && bun scripts/retain-cloudflare-assets.ts capture && bun scripts/retain-cloudflare-assets.ts restore
scripts.cf:dev: vp run cf:build && vp run cron:seed-std:if-missing && bun scripts/with-platform.ts cloudflare wrangler dev -c ./wrangler.toml --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --live-reload
scripts.cf:deploy: vp run cf:build && vp run cf:deploy:parser && vp run cf:deploy:app
